title: Lead editing allows future dates of birth to be saved

evidence.quote: if (!formData.dob) errs.dob = 'Date of birth is required';

reasoning: The edit panel only requires a DOB value; it does not reject future dates and the date input has no max constraint. handleSubmit then persists formData.dob directly. This can corrupt patient lead demographics with impossible future birth dates, while the adjacent appointment form already treats DOB as a past-date field, indicating the intended behavior for patient DOBs.
reproduction: Open a lead for editing, choose tomorrow's date in the DOB field, complete the other required fields, and save. The client sends the future date in the updateLead payload.
recommendation: Add client-side validation that DOB must be a valid past date, set the date input max to today's date, and rely on the backend to enforce the same invariant.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are linked for the lead edit flow or DOB validation boundaries.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a lead edit validation test that attempts to save a future DOB and asserts updateLead is not called and a DOB error is shown.
minimumFixScope: src/pages/LeadBox.jsx EditPanel DOB validation and input constraints.

history.reasoning: The original evidence in src/pages/LeadBox.jsx still exists around the same lines: DOB is still submitted as dob: formData.dob and the date input still has no max attribute. However, EditPanel.validate now adds else if (new Date(formData.dob) > new Date()) errs.dob = 'Date of birth cannot be in the future'; handleSubmit returns before api.updateLead when validate returns errors, so the original UI reproduction no longer sends/saves a future DOB through LeadBox editing. No regression tests are present for this flow, and npm run lint could not be run because the read-only policy rejected it. Note: backend lead update validation still only checks isISO8601 for dob, so direct API enforcement remains a residual gap, but the reported LeadBox edit-panel client issue is fixed.
commands: rg -n "Date of birth is required|handleDobChange|dob: formData\.dob|type=\"date\"|max=" src/pages/LeadBox.jsx
rg -n "LeadBox|EditPanel|future.*dob|DOB|Date of birth|updateLead|dob" src test tests __tests__
rg -n -C 8 "Date of birth cannot be in the future|const validate|api\.updateLead|data-edit-field=\"dob\"|type=\"date\"" src/pages/LeadBox.jsx
